tasks.description: Create users table for Discord OAuth
steps: Verify columns: id (UUID), discord_id (TEXT), discord_username (TEXT), avatar_url (TEXT)

tasks.description: Create minions table with full lifecycle state
steps: Verify columns include: id, user_id, status, repo, task, model, clarification_question, clarification_answer, clarification_message_id, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd, pr_url, error, session_id, pod_name, discord_message_id, discord_channel_id, created_at, started_at, completed_at, last_activity_at
Verify status enum or check constraint: pending, awaiting_clarification, running, completed, failed, terminated
Verify foreign key to users table

tasks.description: Create minion_events table for append-only event log
steps: Verify columns: id, minion_id (FK), timestamp, event_type, content (JSONB)
Verify foreign key to minions table with CASCADE delete
Verify index on minions(status, last_activity_at) for watchdog query
Verify index on minions(clarification_message_id) for reply lookup

tasks.description: Set up orchestrator project structure with chi router and health endpoint
steps: orchestrator/cmd/orchestrator/main.go exists with chi router setup
Middleware validates Authorization header against INTERNAL_API_TOKEN
POST /api/minions with { repo, task, model, discord_message_id, discord_channel_id, discord_user_id }
Returns { id, status, repo, task, created_at }
Returns 429 when rate limit exceeded (10/hr per user)
Returns 429 when concurrent limit exceeded (3 pending/running per user)

tasks.description: Implement GET /api/minions endpoint with status filter

steps: Updates minion status to 'terminated' in database
Sends notification to Discord bot webhook
Idempotent: returns success if already terminated/completed
Uses DB transaction to check status before update (handles concurrent requests)
POST /api/minions/:id/callback accepts { status, pr_url?, error?, session_id? }
Updates minion record with completion data

tasks.description: Implement user lookup/creation from Discord ID
steps: POST /api/minions looks up user by discord_user_id
Creates user record in users table if not exists
Uses user.id as FK for minions.user_id

tasks.description: Implement pod creation with security context
steps: GITHUB_TOKEN env var set from orchestrator

tasks.description: Implement pod creation retry with backoff
steps: Pod creation retries up to 3 times on failure
Minion marked as failed after all retries exhausted
Orchestrator waits up to 5min for pod to become ready
If timeout exceeded, pod is deleted
Minion marked as failed with timeout error
Reconciliation runs on orchestrator startup BEFORE HTTP server starts
List all minions with status pending/running
For each, check if corresponding pod exists and is healthy
Mark minion as failed if pod missing or in terminal phase
Delete stray pods not associated with known minions
Log count of orphaned minions marked as failed
Log count of stray pods deleted
Use ghinstallation/v2 library for token management
Token passed to pod via GITHUB_TOKEN env var
If ghinstallation returns 401/403, mark minion as failed with 'GitHub access revoked' error
Log token refresh failures with repo context

tasks.description: Implement SSE client for pod events
steps: SSE client connects to pod's /event endpoint
Token usage extracted and accumulated in minion record

tasks.description: Implement WebSocket endpoint for live streaming
steps: Broadcasts events from SSE client to connected clients
Queries for running minions with last_activity_at > 30min ago
POSTs alert to Discord bot webhook for each idle minion
Also checks for pods in Failed phase (OOMKilled, Evicted)
Marks corresponding minion as failed with termination reason
Queries for minions with status=awaiting_clarification AND created_at > 24h ago
Updates status to 'failed' with error 'Clarification timeout'
POSTs timeout notification to Discord bot webhook
Use pg_advisory_lock to prevent race conditions
Check for existing minion with same repo+task hash in last 5 minutes
If duplicate found, return existing minion ID
Discord bot replies with link to existing minion instead of creating new one
Document --force flag as future enhancement in code comment
Waits up to 30s for in-flight requests to complete
Running minions continue in their pods
Includes git, curl, jq, gh CLI

tasks.description: Create entrypoint script for task execution
steps: Creates session and sends task via OpenCode API
Uses jq for JSON construction (no shell injection)
POSTs callback with pr_url to orchestrator

tasks.description: Implement failure handling and callback retry
steps: On failure: POSTs callback with error message
Non-zero exit if callback fails after all retries
If gh pr create fails due to existing PR for branch, treat as success (idempotent)
If branch push fails due to conflicts, callback with specific conflict error
Log all gh CLI stderr for debugging
If no changes detected, callback with 'no changes' status (not failure)

tasks.description: Set up Discord bot project structure

steps: Immediately reacts with 🤔 emoji on command message
Validates model name against allowed list (anthropic/*, openai/*)
Defaults to anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5 if model not specified
Extracts task description from remaining text
Rejects tasks >10k chars or with control characters
Rejects unknown model with 'Unknown model' error
Tracks minions per user per hour
If LLM responds 'READY', proceeds to spawn minion
If LLM responds with question, posts question to Discord
Retries LLM call 3x with exponential backoff on failure
If all 3 retries fail, calls orchestrator to mark minion as failed
Posts failure notification to Discord on retry exhaustion
Bot detects replies to clarification messages via message reference
Appends user's answer to original task
Proceeds to spawn minion via orchestrator API
If clarification message deleted, fails minion with 'Clarification cancelled'

tasks.description: Implement webhook handler for orchestrator callbacks
steps: POST endpoint receives callbacks from orchestrator
On completion: posts PR URL to Discord channel
On failure: posts error summary to Discord
On idle: posts idle warning with link

tasks.description: Set up Next.js project with NextAuth Discord OAuth
steps: control-panel/app directory exists with Next.js App Router
Session available in server and client components

tasks.description: Implement dashboard page with minion cards
steps: / route shows list of minion cards
Cards show: status, repo, user, created time
Status indicators: pending (gray), running (blue pulse), completed (green), failed (red), terminated (orange)

tasks.description: Implement minion detail page with live events
steps: Displays: task, model, PR link (if available), cost
Shows live event log with virtual scroll (handles 10k+ events)
Syntax highlighting for code blocks in events
Terminate button visible for running minions
UI updates to show terminated status
On reconnect: fetches events with timestamp > last_received_timestamp
Merges fetched events into log, deduplicating by event ID
Updates TanStack Query cache on WebSocket events
Test: disconnect for 30s, verify all events appear after reconnect
Secret for GitHub App (app ID, private key)
Devbox pods: egress to DNS, HTTPS, orchestrator callback only
Orchestrator: ingress from devbox pods, control panel, external
Documents OAuth2 configuration for control panel

patterns: Go services: chi router, pgx for PostgreSQL, client-go for K8s
GitHub App: ghinstallation/v2 for token management
Next.js: App Router, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, NextAuth
